title: Brand Packaging Miniature Architecture Poster AI
sourceTitle: Brand Packaging Miniature Architecture Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Vertical 9:16 hyper-real miniature brand architecture poster for fictional citrus drink can transformed into a miniature juice lab, featuring CITRUS LAB / FRESH PRESS. Subject: fictional citrus drink can transformed into a miniature juice lab is the giant product packaging body transformed into a believable usable building, preserving recognizable packaging silhouette, color logic, material detail, sign placement, and brand identity when supplied. Scene: golden morning light, tiny workers, orange-slice architecture and clean poster labels places the transformed package-building in a realistic city, industrial, public, or studio-scale environment with miniature people and a clear use story. Composition: Fixed vertical poster composition: giant package-building as the central architectural subject, full structure visible, realistic entrances, glass windows, counters, terraces, floors, roof details, interior function zones, tiny human activity, environment integration, and a formal advertising text hierarchy. Signature Elements: Product packaging transformed into architecture, usable storefront or factory logic, tiny people with natural actions, city or studio environment integration, macro scale detail, warm interior glow, and premium commercial poster hierarchy. Style: Ultra-realistic miniature architecture photography mixed with high-end commercial space-model photography and advertising-grade macro realism, with precise scale illusion, rich environmental detail, and polished poster finish. Color Palette: Palette follows the brand or product packaging: source brand colors when provided, realistic city or studio neutrals, warm interior glow, material-specific highlights, and clean readable poster text. Lighting: Advertising macro lighting with believable street or studio atmosphere, warm interior windows, tiny specular details, realistic shadows, weather or time-of-day mood, and clear separation between packaging and environment. Camera: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Materials: Paper cup, takeaway bag, metal can, carton, bottle, label print, windows, glass doors, roads, sidewalks, plants, street lamps, wet pavement, interior counters, signage, and realistic miniature human figures. Typography: CITRUS LAB / FRESH PRESS appears as the poster main title, subtitle, bottom keywords, and small campaign labels; text must be short, readable, and placed like a premium brand poster. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
